title_en: The Dojo Challenger Is a Pint-Sized Swordsman?
title_vi: Kẻ Thách Đấu Võ Đường Là Một Kiếm Sĩ Nhí?
source_condition: EN-asset-is-English (en.json non-empty English; asset text English) — JP primary via ja.json, EN asset structural authority
notes:
EN-asset-is-English case: translated JP->VI via ja.json, used EN asset as structural authority (BOM/CRLF/
/delimiters).
Commander = <user> field: rendered as 'anh' (male) speaking to females, 'em' (self) to Commander; in 兵士A speech 'Chỉ Huy' used as the honorific the soldier uses.
ハツネ = Hatsune (fox Beastkin; serves a young lord -> thiếu chủ; addresses Commander as 'anh').
コトノ = Kotono (female retainer; addresses Commander as 'Chủ Nhân' = Milord).
Frontline Base -> Căn Cứ Tiền Tuyến; Abyss -> Hắc Huyệt; Hourai kept (proper domain); Beastkin -> Thú Nhân.
Speaker name field (兵士A/兵士B/ハツネ/コトノ/？？？/<user>) kept byte-identical (JPN) per rules.

Internal ASCII commas within VI text fields replaced with U+201A (‚); all
counts mirrored from source.
